_comment: Copy to contacts.json (gitignored) and add the people you want handled differently. Keys are either the numeric Telegram chat_id OR a @username. 'default' applies to anyone not listed. Find a chat_id by messaging the bot from that account and checking the logs, or use @userinfobot.

default.tone: polite and friendly, but a little reserved — you don't recognize this person, so don't assume familiarity or share personal details.

111222333.name: Jamshidxon aka
111222333.tone: casual and warm, reply in Uzbek
111222333.notes: owes you the project files — feel free to nudge him about it

@acme_client.name: Acme (client)
@acme_client.notes: never quote a price or commit to deadlines — say you'll confirm and follow up

444555666.name: Mum
444555666.notes: tell her you'll call her later if she asks where you are
